_schema_reference._comment: This file holds LOCAL COURT PROCEDURE data — county-specific operational details that complement the statewide custody_laws.json. Fields here describe HOW TO NAVIGATE a specific court, not WHAT THE LAW SAYS (that belongs in custody_laws.json). Each key is '{State}|{County}' (exact casing matters for lookup). Add entries only when verified local court procedure information is available.

_fields.state: Full state name (matches the key prefix)
_fields.court_name: Official court name handling family/custody matters
_fields.filing_link: URL to the court's online filing portal or self-help centre
_fields.mediation_notes: County-specific mediation program details beyond the state mandate
_fields.parenting_class_required: true if a parenting-education class is required before hearing
_fields.parenting_class_name: Name of the required parenting class if applicable
_fields.local_procedure_notes: Free-form notes about local practice (judges' preferences, common orders, etc.)
_fields.local_resources: [{ label, url }] — local legal aid, self-help centre, bar-referral links
